powerpagecomponent.content:
{
  "display_name": "FetchXML - Regions",
  "type": 756150001,
  "value": "<!-- Last modified Tue Oct 21 12:39PM -->
<!-- Last modified Sat Aug 30 10:04AM -->
{% fetchxml regionQuery %}
<fetch>
	<!-- Table -->
	<entity name="account">
		<!-- Columns -->
		<attribute name="accountid" />
		<attribute name="name" />
		<!-- Filter By -->
		<filter type="and">
			<condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" />
		</filter>
		<order attribute="name" />
	</entity>
</fetch>
{% endfetchxml %}
{% assign regionQuerySize = regionQuery.results.entities.size %}
{% assign regions = regionQuery.results.entities %}
<!-- Last modified Sat Aug 30 10:04AM -->
<!-- Last modified Tue Oct 21 12:39PM -->"
}
powerpagecomponent.name: FetchXML - Regions
